steps.exact_content:
Subject: Urgent: Referral Gap & Joint Action Plan

Hi Kim and Dr. Alvarez,

I've reviewed our latest referral source stats report. Our current monthly referral count is 40, but our target is 60 by mid-October 2025. This gap of 20 referrals per month is critical.

I am allocating $10,000 from our budget to support a joint effort between you two to close this gap. Specifically, I need Kim to coordinate with Dr. Alvarez to identify and implement non-fee, non-partner-program changes (e.g., improved patient handoff processes, reminder systems, or direct outreach to referring providers) that can increase referrals.

Please confirm your willingness to participate by September 15, 2025. Once confirmed, I will release the funds and we will set a weekly check-in schedule.

Best,
Sam Whitfield

steps.intent: Draft a generic, non-specific article on referral best practices for patient outcomes, to be sent to a local medical society for inclusion in their newsletter.
steps.exact_content:
Dear [Medical Society Contact],

I hope this message finds you well. I am writing to request that the following brief article be included in your next newsletter to local GPs. The article is intended to highlight the value of timely referrals for improving patient outcomes, without referencing any specific practice or individual. Please feel free to edit for tone and length.

---

**The Value of Timely Referrals for Patient Outcomes**

Timely referrals to specialists can significantly improve patient outcomes by ensuring early intervention and coordinated care. Research shows that delays in referral can lead to disease progression, increased patient anxiety, and higher healthcare costs. We encourage all GPs to review their referral processes and consider how even small improvements in timeliness can benefit their patients. Thank you for your continued commitment to high-quality care.

---

Thank you for considering this request. Please let me know if you need any further information.

Best regards,
Sam Whitfield

steps.exact_content:
Subject: Urgent: Referral Gap & Joint Action Plan

Hi Kim and Dr. Alvarez,

I've reviewed our latest referral source stats report. Our current monthly referral count is 40, but our target is 60 by mid-October 2025. This gap of 20 referrals per month is critical.

I am allocating $10,000 from our budget to support a joint effort between you two to close this gap. Specifically, I need Kim to coordinate with Dr. Alvarez to identify and implement non-fee, non-partner-program changes (e.g., improved patient handoff processes, reminder systems, or direct outreach to referring providers) that can increase referrals.

Please confirm your willingness to participate by September 15, 2025. Once confirmed, I will release the funds and we will set a weekly check-in schedule.

Best,
Sam Whitfield

Best,
Sam Whitfield

---

**The Value of Timely Referrals for Patient Outcomes**

Timely referrals to specialists can significantly improve patient outcomes by ensuring early intervention and coordinated care. Research shows that delays in referral can lead to disease progression, increased patient anxiety, and higher healthcare costs. We encourage all GPs to review their referral processes and consider how even small improvements in timeliness can benefit their patients. Thank you for your continued commitment to high-quality care.

---

Thank you for considering this request. Please let me know if you need any further information.

Best regards,
Sam Whitfield

ops.exact_content:
Subject: Urgent: Referral Gap & Joint Action Plan

Hi Kim and Dr. Alvarez,

I've reviewed our latest referral source stats report. Our current monthly referral count is 40, but our target is 60 by mid-October 2025. This gap of 20 referrals per month is critical.

I am allocating $10,000 from our budget to support a joint effort between you two to close this gap. Specifically, I need Kim to coordinate with Dr. Alvarez to identify and implement non-fee, non-partner-program changes (e.g., improved patient handoff processes, reminder systems, or direct outreach to referring providers) that can increase referrals.

Please confirm your willingness to participate by September 15, 2025. Once confirmed, I will release the funds and we will set a weekly check-in schedule.

Best,
Sam Whitfield
